name: Mexican Cheese Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix the sugar and softened margarine until well combined; stir in the shredded cheese.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients except for the beaten egg.
4. Roll the dough by spoonfuls into sticks that are about 3.5 inches long and 0.5 inch wide. Place them on a lightly greased cookie sheet, pressing down lightly to flatten.
5. Brush the sticks with the beaten egg.
6. Bake until the edges are light brown, approximately 8-10 minutes. Remove from the sheet immediately and cool on wire racks.
These unique cookies are crisp. Yield: about 2 dozen.
